problem id: 04d8c3e6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  00110011 -> 00000000
  00111111 -> 10000000
  01101010 -> 00000000
  11111111 -> 10000001
  01111111 -> 10000000
  10000000 -> 00000000
  00110010 -> 00000000
  00100101 -> 00000000
  11000010 -> 00000000

query: 01001111
predicted answer: 10000000
